# LOM Setup Request

**Web Service Endpoint**

Get information from a device to set up lights-out management (LOM).

## Discussion

This command requires the `DeviceLockAndRemovePasscode` access right, [doc://com.apple.devicemanagement/documentation/DeviceManagement/LightsOutManagementLOM] configuration and is available in macOS 11 and later on [https://support.apple.com/guide/deployment/lights-out-management-payload-settings-dep580cf25bc/web].

### Command availability



### Example request and response



## Commands and responses

- **LOMSetupRequestCommand**: The command to get information from a device to set up lights-out management (LOM).
- **LOMSetupRequestResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to get information from a device to set up lights-out management (LOM).

## Lights-Out Management

- **LOM Device Request**: Send requests to a device using lights-out management (LOM).
